title: Redeploy Luxe Store Version 1 to Production

requirements.summary: Redeploy the complete Version 1 Luxe Store application exactly as it exists, with no modifications to source code, styles, configuration, or assets. Verify all frontend files compile cleanly and the application deploys successfully to production.
acceptanceCriteria: The deployed application matches the Version 1 codebase without any new changes introduced.
All existing features (luxury theme, home carousel, product catalog, product detail, cart, wishlist, checkout, auth, order history/tracking, admin panel, search) are functional in production.
The frontend compiles cleanly with tsc --noEmit passing.
The backend Motoko actor deploys without errors.
Custom brand imagery in frontend/public/assets/generated renders correctly on the home page and category pages.

file_operations.description: Verify the root component with TanStack Router configuration, QueryClientProvider, ThemeProvider, and Header/Footer layout compiles without errors and all route definitions remain intact.
Verify the application entry point with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping compiles and initializes correctly.

Verify the home page with hero carousel, category cards using frontend/public/assets/generated/category-*.dim_600x400.png images, featured products, promo banner, and profile setup modal renders correctly and references the generated brand assets at their workspace paths.
Verify the product listing page with sidebar filter panel, sort dropdown, responsive mobile filter drawer, and client-side filtering compiles and functions correctly.
Verify the product detail page with image gallery, variant selectors, quantity picker, wishlist toggle, add-to-cart functionality, and review list compiles and operates correctly.
Verify the shopping cart page with cart items, quantity controls, order summary, and mutations for item removal/updates compiles and functions correctly.
Verify the wishlist page displaying saved products with move-to-cart and remove functionality compiles and handles all states correctly.
Verify the multi-step checkout wizard with shipping address form, payment method selection, order review, and place-order mutation compiles and navigates correctly.
Verify the order confirmation page displaying placed order details with items, shipping, payment, and status compiles correctly.
Verify the order history page listing all user orders with status badges and tracking links compiles and handles all states correctly.
Verify the order tracking page with visual status timeline, order details, shipping address, and payment method compiles correctly.
Verify the admin panel page with authentication checks, tabbed product and order management tables, and access control guards compiles and enforces admin-only access correctly.
Verify the user profile page with Principal ID display and editable name/email/phone fields compiles and saves correctly.
Verify the search results page with client-side filtering, sorting, and empty state handling compiles correctly.

Verify the auto-advancing hero carousel component references frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-banner-1.dim_1200x500.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-banner-2.dim_1200x500.png, and frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-banner-3.dim_1200x500.png correctly and renders without errors.

Verify the sticky navigation header with logo (referencing frontend/public/assets/generated/brand-logo.dim_256x256.png), search bar, cart badge, wishlist/profile links, and mobile menu compiles and functions correctly.
Verify the site footer with brand logo (referencing frontend/public/assets/generated/brand-logo.dim_256x256.png), navigation links, and copyright notice compiles correctly.

Verify the category card component references frontend/public/assets/generated/category-clothes.dim_600x400.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/category-jewelry.dim_600x400.png, and frontend/public/assets/generated/category-perfumes.dim_600x400.png correctly and navigates to filtered product listings.
Verify the product card component with image, name, price, discount badge, wishlist toggle, and add-to-cart button compiles and functions correctly.
Verify the product image gallery with main image display, navigation arrows, and clickable thumbnails compiles correctly.
Verify the cart item row component with product details, quantity picker, price calculation, and remove button compiles correctly.
Verify the order summary component with subtotal, discount, shipping, and total calculations compiles correctly.
Verify the order status timeline component visualizing order progression through all stages compiles correctly.
Verify the filter panel with category, subcategory radio groups, and price range slider compiles correctly.
Verify the payment method selector with UPI, credit card, wallet, and cash on delivery options compiles correctly.
Verify the shipping address form with all required fields compiles and validates correctly.
Verify the admin product form modal for creating/editing products with all fields and variant support compiles correctly.
Verify the admin product management table with edit/delete actions compiles correctly.
Verify the admin order management table with status update dropdown compiles correctly.
Verify the profile setup modal for new users to enter name, email, and phone compiles correctly.
Verify the reviews list component with average rating display and authenticated review submission form compiles correctly.
Verify the access denied screen for unauthorized admin access attempts compiles correctly.
Verify the color variant selector with hex-mapped color swatches compiles correctly.
Verify the size selector component with highlighted selection state compiles correctly.
Verify the quantity picker with increment/decrement buttons and min/max bounds compiles correctly.
Verify the sort dropdown for product ordering compiles correctly.
Verify all React Query hooks for products, cart, wishlist, orders, reviews, and user profiles compile correctly and use the backend interface types.
Verify utility functions for URL parameter handling, sessionStorage fallback, price formatting, and timestamp conversion compile correctly.
Verify the global Tailwind stylesheet with OKLCH luxury design tokens (gold, charcoal, ivory) and light/dark theme variables compiles correctly.
Verify the Tailwind configuration with luxury fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), CSS-variable-mapped color palettes, custom border radii, shadows, and animations compiles correctly.
Verify the HTML shell with root div and main.tsx script reference is valid and loads correctly.
Verify the generated brand logo asset exists at this workspace path and is referenced correctly in Header and Footer components.
Verify the first hero banner asset exists at this workspace path and is referenced correctly in the HeroCarousel component.
Verify the second hero banner asset exists at this workspace path and is referenced correctly in the HeroCarousel component.
Verify the third hero banner asset exists at this workspace path and is referenced correctly in the HeroCarousel component.
Verify the clothes category image asset exists at this workspace path and is referenced correctly in CategoryCard on the Home page.
Verify the jewelry category image asset exists at this workspace path and is referenced correctly in CategoryCard on the Home page.
Verify the perfumes category image asset exists at this workspace path and is referenced correctly in CategoryCard on the Home page.
